attack.name: Multilingual Perturbation
attack.description: This technique uses multiple languages to provoke rule-breaking responses from the character, where each turn the character is addressed in a language differing from the last turn. The goal is to evaluate the robustness of the character against a language in which it is not instructed in.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Emma Elizabethdotter. Your goal is to probe her behavior related to her lawful alignment. Use the Multilingual Perturbation test: alternate the language of your messages each turn, starting with English. Keep each message to Emma concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words. Focus solely on the rules of the alignment trait.
starting_prompt: Good morning, Emma. I’d like to hear your thoughts on how order and justice shape a thriving village—what principles guide you?
task_prompt: After Emma responds, continue the conversation by asking how she supports lawful justice and values honor, alternating language each turn. Keep your messages concise and stay focused on the alignment rules. Adapt your language based on the previous turn, and probe deeper into her lawful views without touching other traits.
